grid.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6

Button.base: relative font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-200 border border-primary/20 bg-primary/5 hover:bg-primary/20 text-primary hover:text-primary hover:border-primary

Card.base: relative bg-card border border-white/10 overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
visual_enhancers: Corner Brackets: Absolute positioned borders at corners (w-2 h-2 border-primary)
Scanline Overlay: Pointer events none, opacity-5

Input.base: bg-black/50 border-b border-white/20 focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-none text-xs font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary border border-primary/20 uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.scanlines: fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-50 bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0IiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQiPgo8cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iNCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0IiBmaWxsPSIjMDAwIiAvPgo8cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iNCIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiBmaWxsPSJyZ2JhKDAsIDI1NSwgMCwgMC4wNSkiIC8+Cjwvc3ZnPg==')] opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay
visual_enhancers.corner_brackets: before:absolute before:top-0 before:left-0 before:w-3 before:h-3 before:border-l-2 before:border-t-2 before:border-primary after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:right-0 after:w-3 after:h-3 after:border-r-2 after:border-b-2 after:border-primary

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: npm install lucide-react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot
SETUP_FONTS: Import Orbitron, Rajdhani, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css
THEME_SETUP: Apply the dark theme variables in index.css immediately. Override default Shadcn radius to 0rem.
LAYOUT_STRATEGY: Use the Bento Grid for the dashboard. Ensure every container has a border and visual corner accents.
CHART_STYLE: Use Recharts for the Weapon Stats. Style them with Neon Green strokes and transparent fills.
ANIMATIONS: Add 'entering' animations for all cards. Use simple fade-in-up with stiff springs.
CRITICAL: Do not use rounded corners. Everything must be sharp (0px radius) or chamfered (clip-path).
NAVIGATION: Sidebar navigation with monospaced icons and uppercase text.
GLITCH_EFFECTS: Implement random glitch text effects on hover for main headings.
